expectations.text: The decision marks the skill as applicable.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "applicable": true,
  "agent_type": "general-purpose",
  "model_tier": "standard",
  "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
  "justification": "cross-file bug fix plus test updates is non-trivial code editing with judgment across connected files, so use standard-tier model and general-purpose editing agent.",
  "fallback_strategy": "if gpt-5.3-codex unavailable, stay in standard tier and use next suitable standard model (gpt-4.1, then gemini-3.1-pro, then sonnet); only change tier if standard tier unavailable."
}
